title: Report or Export "My Work" View
excerpt:
Is there a way to export, or report on “my work” view? 
I need to pull a report showing all tasks due within a two week period, assigned to each member of my team. The “My work” view has sufficient enough information tha…

posts.author: Yaraki (Yoshi Araki)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to export, or report on “my work” view?
I need to pull a report showing all tasks due within a two week period, assigned to each member of my team. The “My work” view has sufficient enough information that I need, however, I cannot figure out how to “report” on it. Does anyone have a workaround?

posts.author: rchl (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve also submitted this to be a feature request as I cannot believe this isn’t possible already. Let’s hope we can get some answers soon!

posts.author: SylvieHahn (Sylvie Hahn)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, it would be great if one could also export ‘My Work’ since it collects information from various boards and neatly organises it into overdue, this week, upcoming, etc. Would be great if we could also export this as an excel for a quick and easy overview of multiple (sub-)projects for our clients.

posts.author: rchl (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve also submitted this to be a feature request as I really can’t understand how this isn’t possible already. Hopefully they’ll help with this.

posts.author: OliverSippel (Oliver Sippel)
posts.cookedHtml: I need an option to export word docs in a word or open office readable document. pdf is no option for me because copying text from a pdf copies line breaks, too.

posts.author: rchl (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am requesting that we get the feature to export the “My Work” tab.

After realizing that we can’t pull a report on all tasks we have been assigned for a certain amount of time, being able to export “My Work” would be beneficial.

posts.author: amesthename (Amy)
posts.cookedHtml:
This functionality would be incredibly beneficial for larger organizations.

I’ve been told to use dashboards to get the information I need, but taking the time to connect upwards of 50 boards is clunky and time consuming. “My Work” is a great way to have a more pointed view of what I want to see in a matter of seconds. The only thing that is missing is a way to export or report on the information reflected in “My Work”.

This functionality would also be beneficial when budget deliberations come around.

posts.author: bob1 (bob)
posts.cookedHtml: I would very much like this feature as well. I’m overviewing the work of all departments in our company, so I’d like to have a way to export a list of all outstanding tasks by department in an email to put a bit of pressure on everyone

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Yaraki, @rchl, @SylvieHahn, @OliverSippel, @amesthename @bob1

We developed an app called Board Report Automations that allows generating advanced reports. These reports are built based on monday.com docs so you can export them PDF, collaborate, comment and more. They’re also sent via notification & email.

In this case you can build something like my work just as a report, as an example →

Screenshot 2024-03-05 at 15.21.282144×568 40.1 KB

There’s a bunch of other reports for other user cases of course.
You can find it in the monday.com marketplace within the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: RWC_WS_Group (Ruby Roze)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please! This is what I came here looking for… It would be great if Monday could give you the option to receive a weekly email summarising your ‘My Work’ for the next 7 days and any overdue tasks… would be great to be able to receive this on a Monday morning so that my team knows how they’re tracking and can get across any overdues/to do’s first thing. Is this feature coming soon pleeeeasseee?

posts.author: themightypm (MightyPM)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an update? Is this feature available on Monday yet?
